mapper.select:
select * from subject_tbl WHERE subject_title LIKE '%' || #{subjectTitle} || '%'
and subject_level = #{subjectLevel}
and subject_category = #{subjectCategory}
order by subject_no
order by subject_level asc, subject_no asc
order by subject_level desc, subject_no asc
order by subject_count asc, subject_no asc
order by subject_count desc, subject_no asc
